settings.text: Fresh, never frozen meals delivered to your door. Ready in 2 minutes.

settings.quote_text: Best meal delivery service I've ever tried. The quality is unmatched.
I lost 15 lbs in two months without sacrificing taste.
The convenience factor is incredible. Restaurant-quality at home.
My whole family loves Factor meals. We order every single week.

settings.text: We source only the highest quality ingredients from trusted farms and suppliers.
Every meal is developed by our team of professional chefs for maximum flavor.
Every meal is reviewed by our registered dietitians for balanced macros and nutrients.
Hear from real people who transformed their nutrition with Factor.

settings.testimonial_description: Factor has completely changed how I eat. The meals are delicious and I feel so much better.
As a working mom, Factor saves me hours every week. The kids love the meals too!
I finally hit my macro goals without spending hours meal prepping. Highly recommend!

settings.text: Factor delivers chef-crafted, dietitian-approved meals straight to your door. Simply choose your meals, select a delivery date, and enjoy fresh, never-frozen meals that are ready in just 2 minutes.

settings.heading: How long do the meals last?

settings.text: Our meals stay fresh in the refrigerator for up to 7 days after delivery. Each meal is clearly labeled with a best-by date so you always know when to enjoy them.

settings.heading: Can I skip or cancel my subscription?

settings.text: Absolutely! You can skip a week, pause, or cancel your subscription at any time through your account dashboard. There are no long-term commitments or cancellation fees.
Yes! We offer meals for a variety of dietary preferences including keto, calorie-smart, vegan & veggie, and protein plus. Each meal is clearly labeled with nutritional information and allergens.

settings.heading: What areas do you deliver to?

settings.text: We currently deliver to all 48 contiguous US states. Delivery is free on orders over $50. Enter your zip code at checkout to confirm delivery availability in your area.
